title: crepidium mindanaense
intro: Crepidium mindanaense, also known as Mindanao crested helmet, is a species of orchid native to the Philippines. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The leaves and flowers of Crepidium mindanaense are used to make herbal preparations, such as infusions and poultices, which provide relief from pain and inflammation, as well as promoting healthy skin and wound healing. Traditional healers use Crepidium mindanaense to treat various health issues, including reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of arthritis.
